description_long: This is a rugged, olive-green backpack with a utilitarian design, featuring a large main compartment secured by a flap and a central leather strap with a buckle. The front of the backpack displays two symmetrical external pockets, each with its own strap and buckle closure, providing additional storage. The back panel is quilted for comfort and durability, and two long, matching shoulder straps are attached for carrying. The material appears to be a heavy-duty canvas or similar fabric, with leather accents on the straps and closures. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, giving the backpack a minimalist, functional appearance. The overall shape is rounded and slightly structured, suitable for urban use and outdoor activities.
description: A sturdy olive-green canvas backpack with leather straps, two front pockets, and a quilted back panel. It has a minimalist, utilitarian design with no visible branding or decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap, central leather strap with buckle, and two symmetrical front pockets with strap closures.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the backpack's depth, side stitching, and the attachment of the shoulder straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the quilted back panel and both long shoulder straps extending from the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and strap attachment points.
attribute_strap_design: Two long, flat, adjustable shoulder straps made of matching canvas material; no visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment under the flap, two external front pockets with strap closures, no visible side or mesh pockets.
